options.text: Those whose survival requires immediate care are classified level 3.
Those with minor injuries but suffering extreme pain are classified level 1.
Those in cardiac arrest or not breathing are classified level 2.
Those who will survive if care is somewhat delayed are classified level 2.

explanation: In standard triage systems, casualties are categorized by priority. Level 2 (Yellow) patients are those with serious injuries who can wait for a short duration while those with immediate life-threats (Level 1/Red) are managed first.
